title: Menopause metabolic risk review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.
presenting_history.rationale: The exact menopause symptom section supports onset, change, impact, associated symptom and patient-concern documentation without inferring menopause or attributing metabolic risk.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.

investigations.text: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.
investigations.rationale: The exact cardiovascular risk-review section supports measured weight, clinician-reviewed metabolic laboratory results, an entered plan and patient questions only when reviewed; it does not calculate risk or generate advice.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.

source.title: Cardiovascular disease: risk assessment and reduction, including lipid modification

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.3.12 — cardiovascular risk and lifestyle review

treatment_and_management.text: Defines documented review at three months, annually thereafter, or earlier for ineffectiveness, adverse effects, or clinical need.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact review section supports arranged follow-up and clinician-discussed safety net without inserting a fixed interval or therapy.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Defines documented review at three months, annually thereafter, or earlier for ineffectiveness, adverse effects, or clinical need.

sources_used.title: Cardiovascular disease: risk assessment and reduction, including lipid modification

source_limitations: Menstrual and menopause status, age, symptoms, blood pressure, glucose, lipid values, cardiovascular history, VTE risk, medicines, diagnosis and management remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
